_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communicate situational awareness information to leadership
reference_document_element_description: Build organizational data culture through executive sponsorship, success story amplification, recognition programs, and visible leadership commitment to data-informed decision-making.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Task LS-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.428).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.440). Shared vocabulary: [leadership]. NICE-only terms [awareness, communicate, information, situational] vs WIDAI-only terms [amplification, build, commitment, culture, data, decision] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.881, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Communicate situational awareness information to leadership" and "Build organizational data culture through executive sponsorship, success story a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.430 ≈ STS 0.440 (gap 0.010). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [leadership] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [leadership]. NICE-only: [awareness, communicate, information, situational]. WIDAI-only: [amplification, build, commitment, culture, data, decision].
